code: import React from"react";import"./Result.css";import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Result=_ref=>{let{username,score,totalQuestions,onRestart}=_ref;const percentage=score/totalQuestions*100;let message="";let messageClass="";if(percentage>=80){message="Bravo, excellent travail !";messageClass="excellent";}else if(percentage>=50){message="Pas mal, continue à t'entraîner.";messageClass="good";}else{message="Il faut persévérer, ne lâche rien !";messageClass="retry";}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"result",role:"main","aria-label":"R\xE9sultat du quiz",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{children:["R\xE9sultat de ",username]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"score",children:[score," / ",totalQuestions]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"score-label",children:[Math.round(percentage),"% de bonnes r\xE9ponses"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:`message ${messageClass}`,children:message}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"restart-btn",onClick:onRestart,"aria-label":"Recommencer le quiz",children:"Recommencer"})]});};export default Result;
